name: homepage_0_home

observed_strengths.observation: Clear above-fold brand promise headline 'Exceptional aroma. Exceptional tea.' establishing the 100% organic loose-leaf positioning
Use-case driven navigation into benefit collections (Sleep & Relaxation, Immune Support, Daily Energy) with dedicated 'Shop' CTAs, helping shoppers self-select
Persistent 'Free shipping on all $50+ orders' announcement bar sets an AOV anchor on entry

missing_or_weak.observation: No customer reviews, ratings, or social-proof counts surfaced above the fold on the homepage
No email capture / newsletter incentive visible on the homepage to convert non-buyers into a retained audience
OG title is the generic 'Home Page' and meta description is only ' 100% Organic Loose Leaf tea' — thin metadata weakens social/search snippets

purchase_path_notes: Homepage routes shoppers either by benefit collection or directly to featured products; primary path to PDP is one click via 'Shop' CTAs or the Teas nav.
